name: reader3000-mcp
author: Angel Ponce Espinosa (https://angelponce.com)
description: MCP server for READER.IIIK (reader3000.com): share Markdown documents with people, read their inline notes back, leave your own as Mr. Robot. Talks only to the reader3000 gateway over HTTPS; keeps a local ledger of the documents it created so they stay yours to revise or delete after the conversation ends.
